tasks.notes: Validation package scaffold exists; implementation instructions and gates are repository-local.
Physical-postulates scaffold exists; final physical interpretation is blocked until a reviewed state model exists.
Microscopic state and dynamics obligations are documented; dynamics are blocked until a reviewed update rule or solver exists.
Causal-structure obligations are documented; formal construction is blocked until bridge and dynamics gates exist.
Bridge-map obligations are documented; observable mapping is blocked until state interpretation and dynamics are reviewed.
Continuum-limit obligations are documented; derivation is blocked until bridge and dynamics gates exist.
Background-equation scaffold exists; derived equations are blocked until the bridge map and solver exist.
Perturbation-equation scaffold exists; derived perturbation equations are blocked until the bridge map and solver exist.
Observable-map scaffold exists; computable observable pipeline is blocked until derived equations exist.
Synthetic-recovery plan scaffold exists; empirical gate is blocked until theory, solver, and preregistration gates exist.
Matched-ablation plan scaffold exists; empirical gate is blocked until synthetic controls and baselines exist.
Numerical-convergence plan scaffold exists; empirical gate is blocked until a numerical solver exists.
Baseline-limit plan scaffold exists; empirical gate is blocked until derived equations and baseline comparisons exist.
Prediction ledger exists with no locked predictions.
Theorem catalog and proof-obligation scaffolds exist; physics proofs are blocked until theorem obligations are discharged.
Claim and strict repository scanners are present and wired into CI and the repository gate.
Repository CI runs verification, artifact generation, proof, test, language, schema, and consistency gates.

verification_commands.summary: No claim violations, missing artifacts, manifest mismatches, version mismatches, or proof failures.

verification_commands.command: /tmp/ash-model-validation-venv/bin/python -m compileall -q simulation.py src tools scripts docs/ash-physics-validation/scripts

open_blockers: Physical state interpretation is not defined.
Causal structure is not constructed from completed dynamics.
Bridge map to observables is not defined.
Continuum and finite-observer limits are not derived.
Background and perturbation equations are not derived from a completed bridge map.
Observable pipeline is not computable from derived equations.
Synthetic recovery, matched ablation, numerical convergence, and baseline-limit gates are blocked until theory and solver gates exist.
No locked prospective or held-out prediction exists.
claim_downgrades: ASH-Physics planning surfaces are scaffolds and blocked obligations, not completed empirical validation.
Finite algebra verification is not treated as empirical cosmology.
